fields.name: Ethio Telecom Charging Station
fields.description: Ultra-fast charging hub capable of serving multiple vehicles simultaneously with high-speed charging. Operates 24/7 and supports digital payments.

fields.name: Eazy Power Charging Station (Main)
fields.description: Leading EV charging provider offering fast and reliable charging with flexible payment options. Located near Bole / Meskel Square areas.

fields.name: TotalEnergies EV Charging Station
fields.description: Charging station integrated within a TotalEnergies fuel station. Convenient for EV drivers along major roads near Bole International Airport.

fields.name: Eazy Power Charging Station (Telecom Area)
fields.description: Branch station providing consistent EV charging services with support staff. Located near the Ethio Telecom headquarters.

fields.name: EVI Charging Station & Accessories
fields.description: Provides EV charging along with professional installation services and EV-related accessories. One-stop-shop for EV owners in Addis Ababa.
